commitMessage: Add project README with features, controls, and setup instructions

topics.title: Add README with game features, controls, and setup instructions
topics.trigger: The project needed a README so that new contributors and players could understand what the game does, how to play it, and how to run it locally.
topics.response: Created `README.md` covering the game's feature set (expanding grid, adjustable starting grid size, high score persistence, pause/resume, and dark theme), a controls reference table, and quick-start instructions for both development and production builds.
topics.decisions: The README documents the expanding grid mechanic and adjustable grid resolution as headline features, reflecting that these are the most distinctive behaviors of this snake implementation compared to a standard clone. Surfacing them prominently helps set expectations for anyone evaluating or contributing to the project.
